final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-form video cover for an esports monitor product launch.

Style/medium: needs a "极简高级感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Dieter Rams industrial design philosophy, Apple product launch keynote visuals, Muji editorial minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds layout, large title as primary focal point
Subject: must include the 8k GGU esports monitor as the focal subject, featuring 1000Hz refresh rate
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a premium tech-launch atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" (large, primary), "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" (secondary)
Constraints: must be vertical format optimized for short-video platforms, large bold typography for eye-catching impact
Avoid:
